sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39769" key="e)piklu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-κλύζω</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <sense id="n39769.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">-κέκλῠκα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:173" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.173</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>:—<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overflow, flood</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅθι κύματ᾽</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
